name: Orchestrator
description: Minimal runnable v1 for 24x7 agent-defined workflow execution on top of OpenClaw sessions and subagents.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval
pollIntervalMs.help: How often the background orchestrator loop scans for runnable workflows.

leaseTtlMs.label: Lease TTL
leaseTtlMs.help: How long a worker lease is valid before the orchestrator can recover a stuck workflow.

maxConcurrentWorkflows.label: Concurrent Workflows
maxConcurrentWorkflows.help: Maximum workflows the orchestrator may execute at once.

maxConcurrentSteps.label: Concurrent Steps
maxConcurrentSteps.help: Maximum workflow steps the orchestrator may execute at once.

defaultRunTimeoutSeconds.label: Default Step Timeout
defaultRunTimeoutSeconds.help: Default timeout for agent-run steps when the workflow omits one.

defaultRetryLimit.label: Default Retry Limit
defaultRetryLimit.help: Default max retries for steps when the workflow omits one.

allowedTargetAgents.label: Allowed Target Agents
allowedTargetAgents.help: Optional allowlist of agents that workflows may dispatch to.

allowedSubmitterAgents.label: Allowed Submitter Agents
allowedSubmitterAgents.help: Optional allowlist of agents that may submit workflows.

workerOnlyAgents.label: Worker-only Agents
workerOnlyAgents.help: Agents that may execute workflow steps but are not allowed to submit workflows.

allowedStepKinds.label: Allowed Step Kinds
allowedStepKinds.help: Optional global allowlist of workflow step kinds.

submitterPolicies.label: Submitter Policies
submitterPolicies.help: Per-agent workflow submission restrictions such as allowed step kinds or target agents.

memory.label: Mem0 Integration
memory.help: Optional Mem0 bridge for planner context lookup and workflow result journaling.

cleanupCompletedAfterHours.label: Cleanup Window
cleanupCompletedAfterHours.help: How long to retain completed workflow records before cleanup.
